ab: sakamuen cima kisu.
ci Ba’tu Kilang kaku, cacay a bataan ku mihcaan aku ayza.
en: My name is Ba’tu Kilang, and I’m 10 years old.

ab: cima ku ngangan nu misu?
ci Paca’ Aki kaku.
cuwaanay a binacadan kisu?
en: What ethnic group are you from?

ab: u wawa nu Sakizaya kaku.
luma’ay nu misu hatu u Yincumin haw?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: hang, hatu u Sakizaya ku luma’ay niyam.
ch: B:是的，我們全家都是撒奇萊雅族人。
en: Yes, my whole family is Sakizaya.

ab: luma’ay nu misu hatu u Yincumin haw?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: cayay, u Sakizaya ku wama aku, u Layak ku wina aku.
ch: B:不是，我的爸爸是撒奇萊雅族，我的媽媽是漢人。
en: No, my father is Sakizaya, and my mother is Han Taiwanese.

ab: nima a wawa kisu?
ni Buting Taytu a wawa kaku.
u wama isu kuyza haw? pina tu ku mihcaan niza?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: enem a bataan tu ciniza.
u wama isu kuyza haw? pina tu ku mihcaan niza?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: cayay, u niyazu’ay a kalas niyam ciniza, walu a bataan tu ku mihcaan niza.
ch: B:不是，他是我們部落的耆老，他80歲了。
en: No, he is an elder of our tribe. He is 80 years old.

ab: pina tu ku mihcaan ni kakama isu?
sabaw walu tu ku mihcaan nu kakama aku.
mihcaan ni kakama isu pina ku pikakaan tisuwan saw?
ch: A:你哥哥年紀比你大很多嗎?
en: Is your brother much older than you?

ab: lima a mihcaan ku laed niyam.
hacica ku talakaw nu misu?
cacay a lasubu izaw ku sepat a bataan hunan kaku.
matenes tu caay kasasuazih, talakaw tu kisu?
ch: A:好久不見，你是不是長高了?
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. Have you grown taller?

ab: hang, cacay a lasubu izaw ku tulu a bataan hunan tu kaku.
kizemu tu kisu?
cuwa, patelac ku niazih isu.
makudus tu kisu haw?
cayay, kizemu tu kaku.
kizemu tu kisu haw?
hang, tulu a bataan daduy tu kaku ayza.
